credits: Cultivated 🪴 with love by Tainah Drummond 👩‍🌾, in collaboration with João Pesce 👨‍💻 and Chandra Drummond 👩‍🎨, rooted in France 🇫🇷 and Brazil 🇧🇷.
descriptionBody: translates gardens into radial graphics that reveal blooming cycles and color patterns throughout the year. Each visual composition anticipates the garden experience over time, articulating botany and design in a sensitive and strategic reading, making visible the temporal and living dimension of the landscape.
catalogHint: Choose which flowers to work with
resetConfirm: Your selections and custom flowers will be permanently erased.
exportImageHint: SVG is scalable and editable. PNG is a flat high-res image.
importConfirmText: Your flowers and settings will be replaced.
replaceConfirm: Your flowers and settings will be replaced with this garden.
chartDesc: Blooming cycles of {flowers} throughout the year.
